title: Loop Pattern
description: Executable graph topology and protocol flow for a QuestFoundry loop. Defines the LangGraph StateGraph structure, message sequences, quality gates, and execution constraints that implement a Layer 0 production loop.

id.description: Loop identifier matching filename (e.g., 'hook_harvest', 'story_spark', 'lore_deepening'). Must match YAML filename without extension.

metadata.description: Loop metadata from Layer 0 and Layer 2 dictionaries

name.description: Display name from spec/02-dictionary/loop_names.md (e.g., 'Hook Harvest', 'Story Spark', 'Lore Deepening')

type.description: Loop category from Layer 0 (README.md §2: The 12 Production Loops)

loop_guide_ref.description: Reference to Layer 0 loop guide with detailed workflow

playbook_ref.description: Optional reference to Layer 0 playbook (checkbox version of loop guide)

protocol_flow_ref.description: Reference to Layer 4 protocol flow documentation

timebox.description: Expected duration from Layer 0 loop guide (e.g., '60 min', '2 hours', '1 day')

version.description: Semantic version of this loop pattern

topology.description: LangGraph StateGraph structure: nodes (role invocations) and edges (transitions)

entry_node.description: Role ID to start execution (e.g., 'plotwright', 'showrunner'). Must match a node role_id.

nodes.description: Nodes in the graph. Each node represents a role invocation.

role_id.description: Role identifier (matches role profile filename). Multiple nodes can reference the same role.

node_id.description: Optional unique node ID if multiple nodes use same role (e.g., 'plotwright_initial', 'plotwright_rework'). Defaults to role_id if not specified.

role_profile_ref.description: Reference to role profile definition (optional if using default location)

override_config.description: Loop-specific overrides to role profile (e.g., different temperature, additional tools)

llm_config.description: Override LLM config for this node

behavior.description: Override behavior config (e.g., different prompt template)

tools.description: Additional or replacement tools for this node

description.description: What this node does in this loop context

edges.description: Edges between nodes. Defines graph traversal logic.

source.description: Source node_id (or role_id if no node_id specified)

target.description: Target node_id, or special values: 'END' (terminate successfully), 'ERROR' (terminate with error)

type.description:
Edge type:
- direct: Unconditional transition
- conditional: Evaluated at runtime based on condition

evaluator.description:
How to evaluate the condition:
- python_expression: Execute Python code against state
- state_key_match: Check if state key equals value
- artifact_field_match: Check artifact field value
- quality_bar_status: Check quality bar result

expression.description: Python expression or JSONPath for evaluation. Has access to 'state' variable.

routes.description: Map of condition values to target nodes. Example: {'approved': 'END', 'rejected': 'plotwright_rework', 'deferred': 'ERROR'}

default_route.description: Default target if no route matches (optional)

protocol_intent.description: Layer 4 protocol intent that triggers this edge (optional, for protocol flow tracking)

exit_conditions.description: Explicit exit conditions for the loop. Runtime checks these on every node completion.

condition.description: Python expression evaluated against state. If true, loop exits with this status.

final_state_requirements.description: Expected state keys/values at this exit. Runtime validates before exit.

protocol_flow.description: Layer 4 protocol message sequences that implement this loop. Maps protocol intents to graph edges.

message_sequences.description: Ordered sequence of protocol messages for this loop

envelope_requirements.description: Required envelope fields for this message

triggers_edge.description: Which graph edge this message activates (source->target)

correlation.description: Message correlation configuration for this loop

enabled.description: Use correlation IDs to group loop messages?

gates.description: Quality gates and validation checkpoints from Layer 0 QUALITY_BARS.md

gatecheck_required.description: Does this loop require formal Gatekeeper gatecheck before exit? True for loops that produce Cold content.

quality_bars.description: Which of the 8 quality bars apply to this loop's output

gate_points.description: Specific points in the loop where quality checks occur

node_id.description: Node after which gate check occurs

bars_checked.description: Which bars are checked at this point

blocking.description: Does failure block progression? True for formal gatechecks, false for pre-gates.

pre_gate_requirements.description: What must be true before gatecheck can run

artifacts_complete.description: Artifact state keys that must exist and be valid

tu_state.description: TU must be in this state

traceability.description: Layer 0 traceability requirements from TRACEABILITY.md and SOURCES_OF_TRUTH.md

tu_lifecycle.description: TU (Trace Unit) lifecycle requirements for this loop

required.description: Does this loop require a TU to track changes? False only for read-only loops (e.g., Narration Dry-Run).

starts_in.description: Which TU state must the loop start in? (from Layer 4 LIFECYCLES/tu.md)

must_reach.description: Which TU state must the loop reach before exit?

can_defer.description: Can this loop defer the TU instead of completing it?

transitions.description: Explicit TU state transitions this loop performs

trigger.description: What causes this transition (node_id or condition)

produces_cold.description: Does this loop produce Cold Source of Truth content? If true, gatecheck is mandatory.

snapshot_handling.description: Cold snapshot handling for this loop

requires_snapshot_ref.description: Must this loop reference an existing Cold snapshot?

creates_snapshot.description: Does this loop create a new Cold snapshot? (True for merge operations)

snapshot_context_required.description: Must snapshot context be present in state before loop starts?

artifact_lineage.description: How artifacts track their lineage in this loop

tracks_upstream.description: Do artifacts produced in this loop track upstream dependencies?

roles.description: Role participation and dormancy management from Layer 0 ROLE_INDEX.md and Layer 1 interfaces/dormancy_signals.md

required.description: Roles that MUST be active for this loop to run. Runtime fails if these roles are dormant.

optional.description: Roles that MAY participate if active, but loop can run without them.

wake_dormant.description: Dormant roles to wake for this loop, with conditions

role_id.description: Role to wake (must have dormancy_policy='optional' in role profile)

sleep_condition.description: When to return role to dormancy (e.g., 'loop_end', 'after_deliverable')

wake_message.description: Human-readable reason for waking (sent via role.wake intent)

context.description: State and context requirements for loop execution

hot_cold.description:
Which Source of Truth this loop operates on:
- hot: Works only in Hot SoT
- cold: Works only in Cold SoT (rare, typically PN operations)
- both: May access both (typically read Cold, write Hot)

required_artifacts.description: Artifacts that must exist in state before loop starts

state_key.description: StudioState key where artifact should exist

required.description: Is this artifact mandatory? If true, runtime fails if missing.

default_value.description: Default value to use if artifact missing (optional)

required_state_keys.description: Non-artifact state keys that must exist (e.g., 'meta.project_id', 'meta.current_snapshot')

state_initialization.description: How to initialize state if keys are missing

success_criteria.description: What defines successful loop completion (from Layer 0 loop guides)

artifacts_produced.description: Artifact state keys that must exist at success exit

bars_must_be_green.description: Which quality bars must be green for success

tu_final_state.description: Required TU state at successful exit

execution.description: Runtime execution parameters and error handling

max_iterations.description: Maximum iterations for conditional loops (prevents infinite loops from gatekeeper rejection cycles)

checkpointing.description: State checkpointing configuration for LangGraph persistence

checkpoint_after_nodes.description: Node IDs after which to checkpoint state (empty = checkpoint after every node)

error_handling.description: How to handle errors during loop execution

on_validation_error.description: What to do when artifact validation fails

on_bar_failure.description: What to do when quality bar fails at gatecheck

on_protocol_error.description: What to do when protocol message fails to send/receive

enabled.description: Allow human interaction during loop execution?

checkpoints.description: Points where human input is requested

after_node.description: Node after which to ask question

question.description: Question to ask human (Jinja2 template with access to state)

options.description: Predefined options for human to choose from

required.description: Must human respond, or can loop continue without response?

timeout.description: Seconds to wait for human response before timeout

trace_state_changes.description: Log state diffs after each node?

metadata.description: Additional metadata for documentation and tooling
